name: wad

evidence.summary: WAD archive loader + resource manager. 256-slot cache, 22 asset types (TMD/KMD models, textures, BGM, SFX, banks). Path-based WAD navigation (ROOT/SCAR/SCAR1_H/...).

functions.wad_debug_loop: Empty loop with obfuscation — used to match original compiler output
functions.wad_strcat: Concatenate src string onto dst, uppercase both
functions.wad_strcpy: Copy src string to dst (simple overwrite)
functions.wad_streq: Compare two strings for equality, return 0 if equal
functions.wad_entry_find: Hash-based lookup: uppercase name, return index or -1
functions.wad_entries_reset: Reset/init all 256 resource entries (flags=1, indices=-1, name='')
functions.wad_load_area_init: Set up WAD load area: split buffer into header + data regions
functions.wad_open_nested: Find nested .WAD file by name in current folder, set data pointer
functions.wad_select_folder: Select folder entry by name in current WAD header
functions.wad_open: Open WAD by name: root ('') or folder within current or nested file
functions.wad_open_path: Open path like 'SCAR/SCAR1_H' — split by '/', traverse folders
functions.wad_sync_dma_slots: Copy DMA slot data pointers into resource entries after defrag
functions.wad_load_path: Entry point: compact, open path, load all files for context, clear buffer
functions.wad_unload_context: Free all resource entries matching a given context ID
functions.wad_unload_type: Free all resource entries of a given WadFileType
functions.wad_load_all: Main dispatcher: iterate current folder's files, add + load by type
functions.wad_entry_alloc_dma: Allocate DMA slot for entry's primary data
functions.wad_entry_alloc_unpacked: Allocate DMA slot for entry's unpacked data
functions.wad_entry_free: Free entry: mark flags=1, free both DMA slots, clear name/data
functions.wad_entry_load_data: Load entry data: DMA + optional LZHUF decompress if packed
functions.wad_compact_entries: Compact entry table: remove freed (flags&1) entries, shift remaining
functions.wad_load_anm: Load type 0 ANM: DMA raw, then reloc pointer array header
functions.wad_load_tex: Load type 1 TEX: DMA raw (texture data)
functions.wad_load_sp2: Load type 2 SP2: DMA, reloc sprite parts ptrs, fix palette entry 0 transparency
functions.wad_load_kmd_0: Load type 3: KMD data → anim buffer → model scaffold (param 0)
functions.wad_load_gmd: Load type 7 GMD: KMD data → anim buffer → model scaffold (param 1)
functions.wad_load_k3: Load type 20 K3: KMD → anim buffer → Model (render=eec8b086, flags=0x10)
functions.wad_load_k4: Load type 21 K4: KMD → anim buffer → Model (render=bb5426b0, flags=2)
functions.wad_load_k5: Load type 22 K5: KMD → anim buffer → Model (render=fc23f083, flags=1, bone_setup)
functions.wad_load_tmd: Load type 8 TMD: KMD → anim buffer → Model (render=fd763f4f, flags=8, anim_setup)
functions.wad_load_ctl: Load type 10 CTL: DMA, copy to gAlBankFileBuffer, free entry
functions.wad_load_vox: Load type 19 VOX: DMA, copy to SFX bank slot 2, setup bank
functions.wad_load_sfb: Load type 13 SFB: DMA, copy to SFX bank slot[context], mark loaded
functions.wad_sfx_rendermode: Set GT render mode for SFX (XLU_SURF or white prim color)
functions.wad_load_sp3: Load type 12 SP3: KMD → anim buffer → Model (render=fc23f083, no flags)
functions.wad_load_oc: Load type 17 OC: DMA raw (open camera data)
functions.wad_load_k2: Load type 15 K2: KMD → anim buffer → Model (render=fc23f083, flags=4, bone_setup)
functions.wad_load_mov: Load type 16 MOV: callback or DMA raw if no callback registered
functions.wad_load_sym: Load type 18 SYM: conditional load (only if gWadCondLoad[ctx] is set)
functions.wad_resolve_sp2: Re-resolve type 2 SP2: fix texture pointers after reload
functions.wad_relocate_sp2: SP2 relocation callback — adjust sprite parts ptrs after DMA
functions.wad_resolve_tmd: Re-resolve type 8 TMD: rebuild Model from existing data
functions.wad_resolve_k3: Re-resolve type 20 K3: rebuild Model (eec8b086, flags=0x10)
functions.wad_resolve_k4: Re-resolve type 21 K4: rebuild Model (bb5426b0, flags=2)
functions.wad_resolve_k5: Re-resolve type 22 K5: rebuild Model (fc23f083, flags=1, bone_setup)
functions.wad_resolve_gmd: Re-resolve type 7 GMD: re-register model scaffold (param 1)
functions.wad_resolve_tbl: Re-resolve type 11 TBL: alBnkfNew on loaded bank data
functions.wad_resolve_seq: Re-resolve type 9 SEQ: set up audio sequence player from entry data
functions.wad_resolve_sfx: Re-resolve type 14 SFX: set up SFX bank for context
functions.wad_resolve_k2: Re-resolve type 15 K2: rebuild Model (fc23f083, flags=4, bone_setup)

globals.sWadEntryCount: Number of active resource entries in sWadEntries
globals.sWadHeader: Pointer to loaded WAD header in buffer
globals.sWadDataEnd: End of WAD data region in buffer
globals.sWadDataPtr: Current WAD data pointer (for DMA offsets)
globals.sWadBufferSizeHdr: Size of buffer region reserved for WAD header
globals.sWadBufferSizeData: Size of buffer region reserved for WAD data
globals.sWadFileCount: Number of files in current folder
globals.sWadFolderCount: Number of folders in current WAD
globals.sWadMovCallback: Callback function pointer for MOV (type 16) loading

open_questions: x_eec8b086 / x_bb5426b0 / x_fc23f083 / x_fd763f4f — render function pointers for model types; semantic difference unknown
sAlBankFile (gAlBankFileBuffer) — ALBankFile buffer, exact relationship to context unclear
x_f12166b8 (gSfxBanks) — SFX bank slot array; mapping of slot index to context ID (0/1/2) unclear
x_77831b2c (gWadCondLoad) — conditional load enable flags per context; exact usage pattern unclear
WAD type 3 (WAD_UNUSED_3) — never appears in any WAD; dead code or legacy type
Type 5 (WAD_DB) and type 6 (WAD_PCL) — fall through to default raw loader; no specific parsing in wad.c
sWadUnk1, sWadUnk2 — accessed by unknown code paths; purpose unclear
